betterquesting:10.desc:8:
§6Fusion Reactor§f (the "Torus") is a massive 15x15x5 multiblock for high-tier power generation. Unlike fission reactors, it §acannot meltdown§f - making it very safe but expensive.

§eKey Components:§f
• §bFusion Reactor Vessel§f - Main ring with 4 connection ports
• §bKlystrons§f - Plasma igniter, converts electricity + compressed air into §bKyU§f (1 MKyU/t each)
• §bBoiler§f - Converts water to §bSuper Dense Steam§f (200 TU/mB)
• §bMHD Turbine§f - §aDirect energy production§f (+35% bonus vs thermal)
• §bCollector Chamber§f - §a+50% byproduct production§f (Helium-4, Chlorophyte)
• §bBreeding Chamber§f - Irradiation recipes using neutron flux
• §bCoupler§f - Chains two vessels together for high-tier fuels

§ePlasma Types (by difficulty):§f
• §bDeuterium-Oxygen§f - Entry level (250 kKyU/t input)
• §bDeuterium-Tritium§f - Mid-tier (3.75 MTU/t output)
• §bHelium-3§f - §aAneutronic§f (no radiation)
• §bChlorine§f - High flux (1000 flux/t) for breeding
• §bDHC§f - Requires §cCoupler§f (10 MKyU/t input)
• §bStellar§f - Ultimate fuel (§e50 MTU/t§f, 10,000 flux/t)

§eRequirements:§f Constant §bPerfluoromethyl§f coolant and electricity for magnetic containment.

§aTips:§f
• §bPort Sharing§f reduces efficiency - spread attachments across ports
• Ensure Klystrons are fully buffered before igniting high-tier fuels
• §bAutomate fluid/item inputs§f - consumption is rapid
